notes: 2S 260mAh with onboard protection/balancing — same cell/capacity figures as lipo-2s-260, `has_bms: true` so it doesn't trip E44. This is the numbered curriculum's reference battery (harness/lessons/*.json): the teaching sequence is meant to model correct baseline practice, not the exact gap E44/E45 exist to catch. `lipo-2s-260` (bare, no BMS) stays reserved for example-solar-charging-demo.json and the E43 lesson, which deliberately demonstrate that gap.
description: A protected two-cell lithium battery — the same cells and capacity as lipo-2s-260, but with its own onboard balancing/protection circuit, so a design built around it doesn't depend on an external balance-aware charger to stay safe.
